header.searchPlaceholder: Which khata do you need? e.g. HSC Physics 1st Paper

marquee.customBn: রেডিমেড নয়, প্রতিটি খাতা তৈরি হয় আপনার চাহিদা অনুযায়ী — ইনডেক্স ও PDF পাঠালেই আমাদের এক্সপার্ট আর্টিস্টরা হুবহু কপি করে দেবেন
marquee.customEn: Never off-the-shelf, every khata is made to your requirements — send your index & PDF and our expert artists will copy it exactly

sidebar.customNote: We make custom khata, not ready-made

hero.customNote: No ready-made khata here — just send us your index and PDF, and we'll handwrite it exactly like yours.

bundle.title: PCMB + ICT Full Package
bundle.subtitle: Practical + drawing khata — HSC 2026 & 2027 batch
bundle.item3: Just send the topics or a PDF — we handle the rest

testimonials.heading: What students say
testimonials.q1: My Biology khata came out so clean my teacher thought it was printed!
testimonials.q2: The Physics diagrams are perfect. Delivery was really fast too.
testimonials.q3: I took the PCMB + ICT full set. Perfect in every subject.
testimonials.q4: Excellent service. My khata came out clean and neat, done right on time. Recommending without hesitation. Thank you! ❤️

trust.qualityText: Free correction if you're not happy

footer.delivery: Home delivery nationwide — orders confirmed on advance payment

assistant.title: Khata Assistant
assistant.greeting: Assalamu Alaikum! 👋 How can I help you?
assistant.deliveryAnswer: Delivery takes 2-3 working days nationwide, 1-2 days in Dhaka. Orders are confirmed after advance payment.
assistant.priceAnswer: Each khata starts from ৳310, Biology is ৳385-৳465. The PCMB + ICT full package is just ৳3,060.
assistant.paymentAnswer: We accept bKash, Nagad and Rocket — number: 01611-987955.
assistant.trackingAnswer: To track your order, use 'Track Order' in the menu above, or message us directly on WhatsApp.
